name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state

TypeOK == state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

Init == state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next ==
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ state[i] = "idle"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ state[i] = "trying"
       /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ state[i] = "critical"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
  \/ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, PowerSet
ASSUME N \in 1..10

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

TypeOK ==
    /\ participants \in [1..N -> {"idle", "prepared", "aborted"}]
    /\ coordinator \in {"idle", "preparing", "committing", "aborted"}
    /\ messages \in PowerSet({("Prepare", i) : i \in 1..N} \cup
                            {("VoteYes", i) : i \in 1..N} \cup
                            {("VoteNo", i) : i \in 1..N} \cup
                            {("Commit", i) : i \in 1..N} \cup
                            {("Abort", i) : i \in 1..N})

Init ==
    /\ participants = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
    /\ coordinator = "idle"
    /\ messages = {}

Prepare ==
    /\ coordinator = "idle"
    /\ coordinator' = "preparing"
    /\ messages' = messages \cup {("Prepare", i) : i \in 1..N}
    /\ participants' = participants
    /\ UNCHANGED <<coordinator, participants, messages>>

VoteYes(i) ==
    /\ coordinator = "preparing"
    /\ ("Prepare", i) \in messages
    /\ participants[i] = "idle"
    /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "prepared"]
    /\ messages' = messages \ {("Prepare", i)} \cup {("VoteYes", i)}
    /\ coordinator' = coordinator

VoteNo(i) ==
    /\ coordinator = "preparing"
    /\ ("Prepare", i) \in messages
    /\ participants[i] = "idle"
    /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "aborted"]
    /\ messages' = messages \ {("Prepare", i)} \cup {("VoteNo", i)}
    /\ coordinator' = coordinator

Commit ==
    /\ coordinator = "preparing"
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : participants[i] = "prepared"
    /\ coordinator' = "committing"
    /\ messages' = messages \ {("VoteYes", i) : i \in 1..N} \cup
                    {("Commit", i) : i \in 1..N}
    /\ participants' = participants

Abort ==
    /\ coordinator = "preparing"
    /\ \E i \in 1..N : participants[i] = "aborted"
    /\ coordinator' = "aborted"
    /\ messages' = messages \ {("VoteYes", i) : i \in 1..N} \cup
                    {("VoteNo", i) : i \in 1..N} \cup
                    {("Abort", i) : i \in 1..N}
    /\ participants' = participants

CommitMessage(i) ==
    /\ coordinator = "committing"
    /\ ("Commit", i) \in messages
    /\ participants[i] = "prepared"
    /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
    /\ messages' = messages \ {("Commit", i)}
    /\ coordinator' = coordinator

AbortMessage(i) ==
    /\ coordinator = "aborted"
    /\ ("Abort", i) \in messages
    /\ participants[i] = "aborted"
    /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
    /\ messages' = messages \ {("Abort", i)}
    /\ coordinator' = coordinator

Next ==
    \/ Prepare
    \/ \E i \in 1..N : VoteYes(i)
    \/ \E i \in 1..N : VoteNo(i)
    \/ Commit
    \/ Abort
    \/ \E i \in 1..N : CommitMessage(i)
    \/ \E i \in 1..N : AbortMessage(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* forks[i] = 0 if free, 1 if held by philosopher i *)
TypeOK == forks \in {0,1}^N /\ state \in {"thinking","hungry","eating"}^N

Init == forks = <<0: i \in 0..N-1>> /\ state = <<"thinking": i \in 0..N-1>>

Left(i) == (i + N - 1) % N
Right(i) == (i + 1) % N

Hungry(i) == state[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[i] = 0 /\ forks[Left(i)] = 0
Eating(i) == state[i] = "eating" /\ forks[i] = 1 /\ forks[Left(i)] = 1

TakeForks(i) == 
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 1, ![Left(i)] = 1]

PutForks(i) == 
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![Left(i)] = 0]

Next == 
  \E i \in 0..N-1:
    \E action \in {"take","put"}:

        IF Hungry(i) THEN TakeForks(i)

        IF Eating(i) THEN PutForks(i)


Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

TypeOK == /\ q \in Seq(0..K)
          /\ head \in 0..K
          /\ tail \in 0..K
          /\ size \in 0..K

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0
        /\ size = 0

Producer == /\ size < K
           /\ head' = (head + 1) % (K + 1)
           /\ size' = size + 1
           /\ UNCHANGED tail
           /\ q' = Append(q, head)

Consumer == /\ size > 0
           /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % (K + 1)
           /\ size' = size - 1
           /\ UNCHANGED head
           /\ q' = SubSeq(q, 1, Len(q))

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N \in 1..10

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in 0..100
          /\ votedFor \in 0..N \/ {None}
          /\ state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = None
        /\ state = "Follower"

RequestVote == /\ state = "Candidate"
               /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
               /\ votedFor' = state
               /\ UNCHANGED currentTerm

GrantVote == /\ state = "Follower"
             /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
             /\ votedFor' = state
             /\ UNCHANGED currentTerm

BecomeLeader == /\ state = "Candidate"
                /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
                /\ state' = "Leader"
                /\ UNCHANGED votedFor

Next == \/ RequestVote
        \/ GrantVote
        \/ BecomeLeader

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

TypeOK == readers \in 0..N /\ writer_active \in {TRUE, FALSE}

Init == readers = 0 /\ writer_active = FALSE

ReadStart == /\ readers < N
              /\ readers' = readers + 1
              /\ writer_active' = writer_active

ReadEnd == /\ readers > 0
            /\ readers' = readers - 1
            /\ writer_active' = writer_active

WriteStart == /\ readers = 0
               /\ writer_active = FALSE
               /\ writer_active' = TRUE

WriteEnd == /\ writer_active = TRUE
            /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Next == \E action \in {ReadStart, ReadEnd, WriteStart, WriteEnd} : action

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamport ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Proc, Chan

(* Proc is the set of processes, Chan is the set of channels (p,q) *)
(* Each channel is FIFO, represented as a sequence of messages *)

(* Types *)
TypeOK == /\ Proc \subseteq 1..N
          /\ Chan \subseteq Proc \X Proc
          /\ \A p \in Proc: Chan[p] \subseteq Proc
          /\ Chan \subseteq { (p,q) \in Proc \X Proc : p # q }

(* Variables *)
vars == << state, channel, marker, finished >>
VARIABLES state, channel, marker, finished

(* state[p] is the local state of process p: "idle" or "recorded" *)
(* channel[(p,q)] is the sequence of messages in channel from p to q *)
(* marker[(p,q)] is a boolean indicating whether a marker has been sent on channel (p,q) *)
(* finished[p] is a boolean indicating whether process p has finished recording *)

Init == /\ state = [p \in Proc |-> "idle"]
        /\ channel = [ (p,q) \in Chan |-> <<>> ]
        /\ marker = [ (p,q) \in Chan |-> FALSE ]
        /\ finished = [p \in Proc |-> FALSE]

(* Process p records its state and sends markers on all outgoing channels *)
RecordState(p) == /\ state[p] = "recorded"
                  /\ \A q \in Chan[p]: marker[(p,q)] = TRUE
                  /\ finished[p] = TRUE

(* Process p receives a marker on channel (q,p) and records its state if not already recorded *)
ReceiveMarker(p, q) == /\ state[p] = "idle"
                      /\ state[p] = "recorded"
                      /\ marker[(q,p)] = TRUE

(* Sending a marker on channel (p,q) *)
SendMarker(p, q) == /\ marker[(p,q)] = TRUE
                   /\ channel[(p,q)] = Append(channel[(p,q)], "marker")

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \E p \in Proc:
          \/ RecordState(p)
          \/ \E q \in Chan[p]: ReceiveMarker(p, q)
          \/ \E q \in Chan[p]: SendMarker(p, q)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES token, state

(* State of each node: "idle" or "sending" *)
TypeOK == token \in 1..N /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "sending"}]

(* Initially, node 1 holds the token and all nodes are idle *)
Init == token = 1 /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

(* Node i can send a message only if it holds the token *)
Send(i) == token = i /\ state[i] = "idle" /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "sending"]

(* After sending, the token passes to the next node *)
Pass(i) == token = i /\ state[i] = "sending" /\ token' = IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1 /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N: Send(i)
        \/ \E i \in 1..N: Pass(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, state>>

====

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS Keys, Values
VARIABLES store


Variables: store

TypeOK == store \in [Keys -> Values]

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
          /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N, M

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen, ballot, value

TypeOK == /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: Nat]]
          /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot: Nat, value: Nat]]
          /\ chosen \in Nat

Init == /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]]
        /\ proposers = [j \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]]
        /\ chosen = 0

Prepare(p) == /\ proposers[p].ballot' = proposers[p].ballot + 1
              /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, chosen>>

Promise(a, p) == /\ acceptors[a].ballot' = proposers[p].ballot
                /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>

Accept(p, a) == /\ acceptors[a].value' = proposers[p].value
               /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>

Accepted(a) == /\ chosen' = acceptors[a].value
              /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, proposers>>

Next == \E p \in 1..M :
          \E a \in 1..N :
            \E b \in 1..N :
              /\ Prepare(p)
              /\ Promise(a, p)
              /\ Accept(p, a)
              /\ Accepted(a)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS File, MAX_RETRIES

VARIABLES chunks, sent, retransmits, finished

TypeOK ==
    chunks \in Seq(File) /\
    sent \in 1..Length(chunks) \/ {0} /\
    retransmits \in 0..MAX_RETRIES \/ {0} /\
    finished \in BOOLEAN

Init ==
    /\ chunks = File
    /\ sent = 0
    /\ retransmits = 0
    /\ finished = FALSE

SendChunk ==
    /\ sent < Length(chunks)
    /\ sent' = sent + 1
    /\ retransmits' = 0
    /\ UNCHANGED <<chunks, finished>>

Retransmit ==
    /\ sent > 0
    /\ retransmits < MAX_RETRIES
    /\ retransmits' = retransmits + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<chunks, sent, finished>>

GiveUp ==
    /\ sent > 0
    /\ retransmits = MAX_RETRIES
    /\ finished' = TRUE
    /\ UNCHANGED <<chunks, sent, retransmits>>

Next ==
    \/ SendChunk
    \/ Retransmit
    \/ GiveUp

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<chunks, sent, retransmits, finished>>

====

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolation ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N, M
VARIABLES committed, snapshot, state, writes


TypeOK == 
    /\ txs \in 1..N
    /\ data \in 1..M
    /\ state \in [txs -> {"idle", "reading", "writing", "committed", "aborted"}]
    /\ snapshot \in [txs -> [data -> Nat]]
    /\ writes \in [txs -> [data -> Nat]]
    /\ committed \in [data -> Nat]

Init == 
    /\ state = [t \in txs |-> "idle"]
    /\ snapshot = [t \in txs |-> [d \in data |-> 0]]
    /\ writes = [t \in txs |-> [d \in data |-> 0]]
    /\ committed = [d \in data |-> 0]

    /\ state[t] = "idle"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![t] = "reading"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<snapshot, writes, committed>>

Read(t, d, v) == 
    /\ state[t] = "reading"
    /\ snapshot[t][d] = v
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, writes, committed>>

Write(t, d, v) == 
    /\ state[t] = "reading"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![t] = "writing"]
    /\ writes' = [writes EXCEPT ![t][d] = v]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<snapshot, committed>>

Commit(t) == 
    /\ state[t] = "writing"
    /\ \A d \in data: writes[t][d] = 0 \/ committed[d] = writes[t][d]
    /\ committed' = [committed EXCEPT ![d] = writes[t][d] \A d \in data]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![t] = "committed"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<snapshot, writes>>

Abort(t) == 
    /\ state[t] = "writing"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![t] = "aborted"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<snapshot, writes, committed>>

Next == 
    \E t \in txs:

        \E d \in data : \E v \in Nat : Read(t, d, v) \/ 
        \E d \in data : \E v \in Nat : Write(t, d, v) \/ 
        Commit(t) \/ 
        Abort(t)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, snapshot, writes, committed>>

====

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, epsilon

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

(* Type constraints *)
TypeOK == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
          /\ offsets \in [1..N -> Int]

(* Initial state: clocks start at 0, offsets at 0 *)
Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

(* Drift: each clock may drift by at most 1 per step *)
Drift == /\ \A i \in 1..N: clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = @ + offsets[i]]
        /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = CHOOSE d \in {-1,0,1}: TRUE]

(* Synchronisation: each node averages its clock with its neighbours *)
Sync == /\ \A i \in 1..N:
          clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = (clocks[i] + \SUM j \in 1..N: clocks[j]) \div N]
        /\ offsets' = offsets

(* One round of drift followed by synchronisation *)
OneRound == Drift /\ Sync

(* After one round, all clocks are within epsilon of each other *)
Spec == Init /\ [][OneRound]_<<clocks, offsets>>

====

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N = 2

VARIABLES flag, turn

TypeOK == flag \in [0..1 -> BOOLEAN] /\ turn \in 0..1

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 0..1 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 0

Next ==
  \/ /\ i \in 0..1
     /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
     /\ turn' = 1 - i
     /\ UNCHANGED turn
  \/ /\ i \in 0..1
     /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
     /\ UNCHANGED <<flag, turn>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

====

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N, Nodes
VARIABLES infected


TypeOK == /\ N \in 1..10
          /\ Nodes = 1..N

Variables: infected

Init == /\ infected = <<>>  \* Initially no node infected

Next == /\ \E node \in Nodes:
          /\ infected' = Append(infected, node)
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<infected>>

====

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PageAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N, Clients
VARIABLES allocated, free


Pages == 1..N

(* Type constraints *)
TypeOK == /\ N \in Nat
          /\ Clients \subseteq 1..1000
          /\ free \in SUBSET Pages
          /\ allocated \in [Clients -> SUBSET Pages]

(* Initial state: all pages free, no allocations *)
Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

(* Request a page: pick any free page, allocate to client c *)
Request(c) == /\ c \in Clients
              /\ free /= {}
              /\ LET p \in free IN
                 /\ free' = free \ {p}
                 /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

(* Release a page: client c releases page p *)
Release(c, p) == /\ c \in Clients
                 /\ p \in allocated[c]
                 /\ free' = free \cup {p}
                 /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

(* Next-state relation: either request or release *)
Next == \E c \in Clients :
          (Request(c) \/ \E p \in Pages : Release(c, p))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

====

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS Topics, Subscribers, Messages
VARIABLES inboxes, pending, subscriptions


TopicSet == Topics
SubscriberSet == Subscribers
MessageSet == Messages

Variables:
  subscriptions \in [SubscriberSet -> SUBSET TopicSet]
  inboxes \in [SubscriberSet -> Seq(MessageSet)]
  pending \in [TopicSet -> Seq(MessageSet)]

Init ==
  /\ subscriptions = [s \in SubscriberSet |-> {}]
  /\ inboxes = [s \in SubscriberSet |-> <<>>]
  /\ pending = [t \in TopicSet |-> <<>>]

Publish(topic, msg) ==
  /\ topic \in TopicSet
  /\ msg \in MessageSet
  /\ pending' = [pending EXCEPT ![topic] = Append(@, msg)]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<subscriptions, inboxes>>

Deliver(topic) ==
  /\ topic \in TopicSet
  /\ pending[topic] # <<>>
  /\ msg = Head(pending[topic])
  /\ subs = subscriptions[topic]
  /\ inboxes' = [inboxes EXCEPT ![s] = Append(@, msg) : s \in subs]
  /\ pending' = [pending EXCEPT ![topic] = Tail(@)]
  /\ UNCHANGED subscriptions

Next ==
  \/ \E topic \in TopicSet : \E msg \in MessageSet : Publish(topic, msg)
  \/ \E topic \in TopicSet: Deliver(topic)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscriptions, inboxes, pending>>

====

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N = 2

VARIABLES turn, wants

TypeOK == /\ turn \in 0..N-1
          /\ wants \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

Init == /\ turn = 0
        /\ wants = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next ==
  \/ /\ turn' = 1 - turn
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![turn] = FALSE]
  \/ /\ turn' = turn
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![turn] = TRUE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

Safety == \A i, j \in 1..N :
              (wants[i] /\ wants[j]) => i = j

Liveness == \A i \in 1..N :
               []<>(wants[i] => wants[i])

====

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Node
VARIABLES counts


TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
          /\ \A n \in Node: \A m \in Node: counts[n][m] \in Nat

Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]

Next ==
  \E n \in Node:
    /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [counts[n] EXCEPT ![n] = counts[n][n] + 1]]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>

====
